SEARCH
Module overrungl.stb
Package overrungl.stb

Interface STBImage

All Superinterfaces:
overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
public interface STBImage extends overrun.marshal.DirectAccess
The STB image reader.
Since:
0.1.0
Author:
squid233
